## What type of PR is this?

- [ ] 🆕 New case / prompt
- [ ] 🐛 Fix (broken link, typo, formatting)
- [ ] 🌐 Translation improvement
- [ ] 📝 Other (describe below)

## New Case Submission

> Skip this section if not submitting a new case.

**Category:** (one of: Portrait & Photography / Poster & Illustration / UI & Social Media Mockup / Comparison & Community)

**Type label:** (e.g., `🔤 Text→Image` / `🖼️ Image→Image` / `🖼️+🔤 Image+Text→Image`)

**Prompt used:**

```
Paste your prompt here
```

**Source tweet (if applicable):** https://x.com/...

**Image/media attached?**
- [ ] Yes, uploaded to the PR or linked via GitHub user-attachments

## Checklist

- [ ] Prompt is inside a code block (` ``` `)
- [ ] Image assets are committed under `images/<category>_case<n>/` (not hotlinked)
- [ ] Case follows the existing `### Case` format in README.md
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing case
